title: How to Build an AI Agent with Claude Code (Claude AI Agent Tutorial)
summary: This tutorial teaches how to build practical AI agents using Claude without coding or APIs, focusing on agent architecture, the CLAUDE.md configuration file, and planning strategies. The video covers three levels of Claude usage, two complete agent workflows, and five common pitfalls in agent development.
writeup: This tutorial walks through building practical AI agents with Claude without writing code or using APIs, centered on agent architecture, the CLAUDE.md configuration file, and planning strategies. It matters because it targets long-horizon reasoning and agentic workflows, areas where configuration and planning shape agent reliability. Concrete takeaways: three levels of Claude usage, two complete agent workflows, and five common pitfalls in agent development.
